title: kb.ai.summarized v1
description: Emitted by kb's ai_summarize (src/kb_ops/ai.rs:97) after a local-LLM (Ollama) summarization of a vault entry completes. Validated against event['data']. Source: /kb.

entry_id.description: Vault entry the summarization was performed on.

model.description: Ollama model used (currently always the OLLAMA_MODEL const, e.g. 'qwen2.5vl:3b'; a plain string, not a fixed schema enum, since the const can change).

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock time the summarization call took, in milliseconds.
